ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" TEXT /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., Urban, Rural) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level of education */,
  "education_description" TEXT /* Description of the level of education */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_types" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of employment */,
  "employment_description" TEXT /* Description of the type of employment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the household */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location ID of the household */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Country ID of the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Household ID of the respondent */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Country ID of the respondent */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the respondent */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the respondent */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the respondent */,
  "has_bank_account" TEXT /* Indicates if the respondent has a bank account */,
  "type_of_location" TEXT /* Type of location of the respondent */,
  "cell_phone_access" TEXT /* Indicates if the respondent has access to a cell phone */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Size of the household */,
  "respondent_age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "relationship_with_head" TEXT /* Relationship of the respondent with the household head */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Marital status ID of the respondent */,
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Education level ID of the respondent */,
  "employment_type_id" INTEGER /* Employment type ID of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_education_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_level_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_employment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("employment_type_id") REFERENCES employment_types ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household member */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Household ID of the member */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Respondent ID of the member */,
  "role_in_household" TEXT /* Role of the member in the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_members_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_members_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Country ID of the data collection */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the data collector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
